description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a slightly dented and weathered surface, painted in a yellow-green color with a red top. The barrel features visible rust patches and scratches, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure and use. On the side, there is a prominent black radiation warning symbol, suggesting it is used for hazardous or radioactive materials. The top of the barrel has two small, round openings, likely for filling or emptying contents, and shows additional signs of corrosion. The barrel lacks any visible handles or spouts, and its construction appears robust, typical of industrial storage containers. Its overall appearance suggests it is designed for secure containment and is commonly found in industrial or hazardous waste environments.
description: A large, weathered yellow-green metal barrel with a red top, rust patches, and a black radiation warning symbol. It has two small openings on the top and no visible handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radiation warning symbol, rust patches, and two openings on the red top.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible markings, showing the red top and more rust patches.
description_view_2: Another front view with the radiation symbol visible, similar to view 0 but from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view with no visible markings, showing the red top and a single opening.
